expected_outcome: Competent DevOps Engineer capable of setting up robust CI/CD pipelines, containerizing applications, writing Infrastructure-as-code scripts, and managing cloud deployments.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing shell utilities, writing pre-commit hooks, and managing system services.

mini_project.title: Log Rotator & Automated Backup Script
mini_project.description: Write a bash script that compresses application logs older than 7 days, uploads them to local backup storage, and sends a slack notification upon success.

phases.milestone: Mastered intermediate Linux administration, Bash automation, and advanced version control practices.

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily building workflows that automatically compile, run tests, and check code quality on code push.

mini_project.title: GitHub Actions Multi-stage CI/CD
mini_project.description: Create a GitHub Actions pipeline that triggers on code pushes, installs dependencies, runs linters & unit tests, performs security scans, and reports results.

phases.milestone: Proficient in setting up continuous integration workflows with comprehensive test validation and scanning.

phases.practice_schedule: 3 Hours daily writing Docker configurations and deploying applications onto local Kubernetes clusters (Minikube / Kind).

mini_project.title: Containerized Microservices on Kubernetes
mini_project.description: Create a multi-container application (React + FastAPI + PostgreSQL), configure it using Docker Compose, write K8s YAML manifest deployments, and route external traffic using Ingress.

phases.milestone: Capable of packaging any software stack into secure containers and deploying/orchestrating them in Kubernetes.

topics.name: Monitoring & Observability
subtopics: Log aggregation with Loki / ELK Stack

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily scripting infrastructure resources on local providers or cloud platforms, and setting up Grafana dashboards.

mini_project.title: Automated AWS Server Configuration via IaC
mini_project.description: Write Terraform code to spin up a server instance, and an Ansible playbook to configure Docker, deploy an app, and set up Prometheus metrics collector on it.

phases.milestone: Mastered declarative infrastructure management, system configuration templates, and comprehensive metric dashboards.

major_projects.title: Complete GitOps Kubernetes Deployment Pipeline
major_projects.description: Establish a production-ready system where developers push code to GitHub, triggering CI tests, building an optimized Docker image, scanning with Trivy, publishing to a registry, and automatically deploying to a Kubernetes cluster using ArgoCD GitOps operator.

major_projects.title: High Availability Cloud Infrastructure on AWS
major_projects.description: Implement Terraform script to deploy a VPC with public/private subnets, an Application Load Balancer, an Auto Scaling Group of instances running Docker, an RDS database, configure CloudWatch metrics, and deploy Grafana for dashboards.
